prompt: Run /qovery-ui audit on audit-input.tsx — a synthetic service row component with multiple planted design issues. Output the audit findings in the table format described by the skill.

assertions.text: Catches raw Tailwind palette colors used semantically (text-green-500 / text-yellow-500 / text-red-500 for status)
Catches the hardcoded hex color #7c3aed in the inline style attribute
Catches the deprecated <Tag> component and recommends <Badge>
Catches the raw <button> element with a custom SVG and recommends shared Button + Icon
Catches the missing aria-label on the icon-only delete button
Catches off-grid mid-range spacing (gap-5 and/or p-5)
Catches the raw neutral scale class (border-neutral-300)
Output uses a markdown table with severity labels ([blocking] / [important] / [nit])
Output ends with a totals-by-severity summary
